where.if: AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{groupName}, '%') OR group_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{groupName}, '%'))

AND ( CAST(id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{idToken}, '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(group_uuid,'')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{idToken}), '%') OR LOWER(group_public_id) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{idToken}), '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM recharge_plan_groups
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM recharge_plan_groups WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recharge_plan_groups ( name, group_name, group_public_id, sort_order, description, status, group_uuid, item_no, item_token, media_platform, pixel_id, pixel_token, creator, created_by, created_by_name, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{groupName}, #{groupPublicId}, #{sortOrder}, #{description}, #{status}, #{groupUuid}, #{itemNo}, #{itemToken}, #{mediaPlatform}, #{pixelId}, #{pixelToken}, #{creator}, #{createdBy}, #{createdByName}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE recharge_plan_groups SET name = #{name}, group_name = #{groupName}, group_public_id = #{groupPublicId}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, group_uuid = #{groupUuid}, item_no = #{itemNo}, item_token = #{itemToken}, media_platform = #{mediaPlatform}, pixel_id = #{pixelId}, pixel_token = #{pixelToken}, creator = #{creator}, created_by_name = #{createdByName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM recharge_plan_groups WHERE id IN
#{id}
